_comment: Minimal IAM policy for the PowerTrace CloudWatch receiver.
cloudwatch:GetMetricStatistics is the only action required.
The cloudwatch:namespace condition key restricts this permission
to the AWS/EC2 namespace only — the receiver never reads metrics
Resource must be '*' — CloudWatch metric actions do not support
Attach to an IAM role assumed by the machine running
receivers/cloudwatch.py. No other permissions are required.
